seoTitle: Johor Rental Market Report | Johor Research
seoDescription: Overview of Johor Bahru rental velocity across 7 tracked projects. Mount Austin and Bukit Indah lead local family demand; R&F dominates commuter premium.
title: Johor Rental Market Report
subtitle: Q2 2026 — family, commuter & yield districts
intro: Overview of Johor Bahru rental velocity across 7 tracked projects. Mount Austin and Bukit Indah lead local family demand; R&F dominates commuter premium.

sections.title: Market snapshot
paragraphs: Average rent spans RM 2,100–3,200 for 2-bed family stock.
Void periods shortest in Mount Austin (2–4 weeks) and R&F (2–4 weeks).

sections.title: Outlook
paragraphs: RTS completion supports R&F and Medini commuter narratives.
Suburban family districts remain supply-constrained for furnished 2-bed.
